nodeName.description: Name of the bare metal node

driver.description: Ironic driver for BMC management (fake-hardware for local testing)

ports.description: PXE MAC addresses for port creation

instance_info.description: Image source and checksum for deploy

configDrive.description: Config drive for cloud-init (metaData, userData, networkData)

configurationRef.description: Reference to NodeConfiguration CR for Ironic API auth

waitTimeout.description: Seconds passed to `openstack baremetal node ... --wait` per transition

nodeNamespace.description: Namespace for Node CR (defaults to release namespace)
